title: Spaghetti with a Twist
description: A classic Italian dish with a unique flavor profile. This recipe combines the simplicity of spaghetti with the bold taste of menudo.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tbsp of menudo over medium heat.
Add the monsoon and snappy, stirring constantly for 1 minute.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the skillet and toss with the menudo mixture.
